actions.name: Ocean's Wrath
actions.description: Effect: All valid targets are @Affliction[bound 7]. While @Affliction[bound], they suffer from @Affliction[drowning] and are Delayed 20% at the end of each of their Activations. This @Affliction[bound] effect can be removed with an Intense Natural World, Navigate or Swim Skill Check or an Impossible Movement-related Skill, Acrobatics, or Survival Skill Check taken as a Complex Action.
